metadata.description: Curated Claude Code skills for IT operations professionals. Bundles for JSM ticket management, Google Workspace administration, Okta identity management, MDM device queries, and Slack IT support.

plugins.name: jsm-ticket-management
plugins.description: Jira Service Management ticket operations — search, update, comment, transition, and triage tickets using natural language.

plugins.name: google-workspace-admin
plugins.description: Google Workspace administration via natural language — replaces common GAM commands with conversational queries. All write operations require explicit confirmation.

plugins.name: okta-admin
plugins.description: Okta identity and access management — user lookups, group management, app assignments, and factor administration. Onboarding and offboarding disabled by default.

plugins.name: mdm-query
plugins.description: Read-only MDM device queries across Kandji, Jamf, and Intune. No device actions — query only.

plugins.name: slack-it-support
plugins.description: Slack communication for IT support workflows — reply to users after resolving tickets, post status updates, and read thread context.
